Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B13FKAISI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5008 0 0}...There was a slight accident, but let's focus on the mission for now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I feel the target's presence from beyond that door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DUNGE_FUKA_B17FKAISI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 2 0 1 10069 0 0}I sense the target two blocks ahead of you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 2 0 1 10070 0 0}It seems to be moving slowly downward.[n]{f 1 1}
